front.title: Composite Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Algorithm (ML-DSA) for use in Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS)

abstract.t: Composite Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Algorithm (ML-DSA) defines combinations of ML-DSA with RSA, ECDSA, and EdDSA. This document specifies the conventions for using Composite ML-DSA algorithms within the Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS).
